name: Vegetarian Greek Mpougiourdi
method: Cut the tomatoes and the spice pepper.
Put the feta cheese in an oven-safe dish and then cover that with some
sliced tomatoes and some chili pepper.
Close and cover again with tomato and chili pepper with a strong
Add a little canola oil and a dash of oregano to the mixture.
Toast for ten minutes in a preheated oven or two minutes on the stove.
